title: tamahh #8539
definition:
1) to be astounded, be stunned, be amazed, be dumbfounded
    1a) (Qal) to be astounded
    1b) (Hithpael) to astonish yourself, be astounded, be astonished at
        one another
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be astounded, be stunned, be amazed, be dumbfounded
    1a) (Qal) to be astounded
    1b) (Hithpael) to astonish yourself, be astounded, be astonished at
        one another

    NASB:  to be astounded or dumbfounded
